text.title: JavaScript/TypeScript Stack Practices Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the config artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "strict_tsconfig": true, "no_unchecked_indexed_access": true, "esm_module": true, "exports_map_present": true, "flat_eslint": true, "ci_typecheck_step": true, "prettier_configured": true, "no_any_error": true, "test_runner": "vitest" }

example.note: strict=false; CommonJS package; missing typecheck step + prettier + no_any_error.

pattern.why: Violates strict-tsconfig; lets implicit any leak through.

pattern.description: package.json has no type field while source uses ESM imports

pattern.why: Violates flat-eslint; legacy cascade conflicts with ESLint 9.
